mapper.select: SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, REQ_IDX,REQ_NAME, PHONE,CELL_PHONE, APPLY_ID,LOCKER_IDX,ADD_DATE,ADD_ID,MOD_DATE,MOD_ID,DELETE_YN, LOCKER_PRE_IDX, MEMBER_KEY FROM LOCKER_REQ WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND LOCKER_PRE_IDX = #{locker_pre_idx} AND MEMBER_KEY = #{member_key} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'

SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, LOCKER_IDX, LOCKER_NAME, LOCKER_DESC, STATUS, ADD_DATE, ADD_ID, MOD_DATE, MOD_ID, LOCKER_PRE_IDX FROM LOCKER WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND LOCKER_IDX = #{locker_idx} AND LOCKER_PRE_IDX = #{locker_pre_idx}
mapper.update: UPDATE LOCKER SET LOCKER_PRE_IDX = #{locker_pre_idx}, LOCKER_IDX = #{locker_idx}, LOCKER_NAME = #{locker_name}, LOCKER_DESC = #{locker_desc}, STATUS = #{status}, MOD_ID = #{mod_id}, MOD_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND LOCKER_IDX = #{locker_idx} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND LOCKER_PRE_IDX = #{locker_pre_idx}

UPDATE LOCKER SET STATUS = #{status}, MOD_ID = #{mod_id}, MOD_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND LOCKER_IDX = #{locker_idx} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND LOCKER_PRE_IDX = #{locker_pre_idx}
mapper.delete: UPDATE LOCKER SET DELETE_YN = 'Y' WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND LOCKER_IDX = #{locker_idx} AND LOCKER_PRE_IDX = #{locker_pre_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT START_DATE, SUM(IMSI_V1) AS IMSI_V1, SUM(IMSI_V2) AS IMSI_V2, SUM(IMSI_V2) AS IMSI_V3 FROM ( SELECT A.START_DATE || '~' || A.END_DATE AS START_DATE, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LOCKER B WHERE B.LOCKER_PRE_IDX = A.LOCKER_PRE_IDX AND B.HOMEPAGE_ID = A.HOMEPAGE_ID AND B.DELETE_YN = 'N' ) AS IMSI_V1, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LOCKER_REQ B WHERE B.LOCKER_PRE_IDX = A.LOCKER_PRE_IDX AND B.HOMEPAGE_ID = A.HOMEPAGE_ID AND B.DELETE_YN = 'N' ) AS IMSI_V2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LOCKER_REQ WHERE LOCKER_PRE_IDX = A.LOCKER_PRE_IDX AND HOMEPAGE_ID = A.HOMEPAGE_ID AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND LOCKER_IDX != NULL) AS IMSI_V3 FROM LOCKER_PRE A WHERE A.DELETE_YN = 'N' AND A.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND TO_DATE(A.START_DATE, 'yyyy-mm-dd') BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_date},'yyyy-mm-dd') AND TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') ORDER BY A.START_DATE ) GROUP BY ROLLUP(START_DATE) ORDER BY START_DATE DESC
